text.title: vui-accessibility-inclusivity Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for vui-accessibility-inclusivity as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: "What do you want?" with no examples or hints.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Users unfamiliar with the command grammar have no way to discover valid inputs and abandon the interface.

failure-mode.description: Saying "I didn't understand" more than twice without offering new information or a different interaction path.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Repeating the same error message with no new guidance traps the user in a loop and damages trust.
